question.label: Team connection
question.name: How connected do you feel to the rest of the team right now?
question.description: Probes isolation or drift without naming it; one of the earliest signals of disengagement.

answer: The hardest part is changing direction late and feeling like I missed something.

assessment.note: He pivoted from team connection to late direction changes and feeling he missed something, signalling mild drag on engagement and wellbeing; also reveals a likely clarity issue worth probing next.

new_queue.label: Missed something
new_queue.name: When you feel like you missed something, where does that usually happen?

new_queue.label: Energy read
new_queue.name: How's your energy been lately — separately from how work is going?

new_queue.label: Unclear expectations
new_queue.name: What feels most unclear about expectations right now?

new_queue.label: Requirements churn
new_queue.name: What part of the shifting requirements has been hardest to work with?

new_queue.label: Help-seeking safety
new_queue.name: What makes it easiest or hardest to ask for help here?

new_queue.label: Steadier next two weeks
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks steadier for you?

history.answer_excerpt: The hardest part is changing direction late and feeling like I missed something.
The hardest part is changing direction late and feeling like I missed something.
